container.heading: Licensing Services — Designation of Contractor — Payment for Services

annotations.annotation: Regulations .01—.04 adopted as an emergency provision effective September 19, 1997 (24:21 Md. R. 1445); adopted permanently effective March 9, 1998 (25:5 Md. R. 368)
Chapter recodified from COMAR 09.31.29 to COMAR 31.03.08 effective September 7, 1998 (25:18 Md. R. 1439)
Regulation .03 amended effective October 5, 1998 (25:20 Md. R. 1534)
Chapter repealed effective April 10, 2006 (33:7 Md. R. 675)
